```diff
+ // Recursive component for rendering parameter/property cards - defined outside to prevent re-creation on every render
+ const ParameterCard = ({
+   param,
+   path,
+   onUpdate,
+   onRemove,
+   onAddProperty,
+   onSetItems,
+   validationAttempted,
+   isProperty = false,
+   isArrayItem = false,
+ }: {
+   param: Parameter;
+   path: string[];
+   onUpdate: (path: string[], updates: Partial&lt;Parameter&gt;) =&gt; void;
+   onRemove: (parentPath: string[], id: string) =&gt; void;
+   onAddProperty: (path: string[]) =&gt; void;
+   onSetItems: (path: string[], items: Parameter | undefined) =&gt; void;
+   validationAttempted: boolean;
+   isProperty?: boolean;
+   isArrayItem?: boolean;
+ }) =&gt; {
+   const currentPath = [...path, param.id];
+   const parentPath = path;
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-5 space-y-5 bg-background"&gt;
+       {/* Data type and Name/Identifier */}
+       &lt;div className={isArrayItem ? "" : "flex gap-4"}&gt;
+         &lt;div className={isArrayItem ? "" : "w-40"}&gt;
+           &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;Data type&lt;/label&gt;
+           &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+             &lt;select
+               value={param.dataType}
+               onChange={(e) =&gt; {
+                 const newType = e.target.value;
+                 if (isArrayItem) {
+                   // For array items, update via the items path
+                   onUpdate([...path], { dataType: newType });
+                 } else {
+                   onUpdate(currentPath, { dataType: newType });
+                 }
+               }}
+               className="w-full h-10 pl-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none"
+             &gt;
+               &lt;option value="boolean"&gt;Boolean&lt;/option&gt;

+               &lt;option value="number"&gt;Number&lt;/option&gt;
+               &lt;option value="string"&gt;String&lt;/option&gt;
+               &lt;option value="object"&gt;Object&lt;/option&gt;
+               &lt;option value="array"&gt;Array&lt;/option&gt;
+             &lt;/select&gt;

+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/svg&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         {/* Name/Identifier - not shown for array items */}
+         {!isArrayItem &amp;&amp; (
+           &lt;div className="flex-1"&gt;
+             &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;
+               {isProperty ? "Identifier" : "Name"}{" "}
+               &lt;span className="text-red-500"&gt;*&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/label&gt;
+             &lt;input

+                 onUpdate(currentPath, { name: e.target.value })

+               className={&#96;w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent ${
+                 validationAttempted &amp;&amp; !param.name.trim()

+                   : "border-border"

+             validationAttempted &amp;&amp; !param.description.trim()

+ 
+       {/* Properties section for object type */}
+       {param.dataType === "object" &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div&gt;
+           &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;Properties&lt;/label&gt;
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl bg-[#1b1b1b] p-4 space-y-4"&gt;
+             {/* Render nested properties recursively */}
+             {param.properties &amp;&amp; param.properties.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+               &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;

+               &lt;button

+                 onClick={() =&gt;
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The fix is complete. The issue was that the `ParameterCard` component was defined inside the `ToolsPage` component. This is a React anti-pattern because:

1. Every time the parent component re-renders (which happens on every keystroke when you type in an input)
2. A new `ParameterCard` function is created
3. React sees this as a different component type (because function references are different)
4. React unmounts the old component tree and mounts a new one
5. This causes focus to be lost because the DOM elements are recreated

By moving `ParameterCard` outside of the main component, it becomes a stable function reference that doesn't change between renders, so React can properly reconcile the component tree and maintain focus.

I also added the `validationAttempted` prop to the component since it was previously accessing it via closure (which only worked when it was defined inside the main component).</details></think>

---

The fix is complete. The problem was that `ParameterCard` was defined **inside** the `ToolsPage` component. This is a common React anti-pattern that causes focus loss because:

1. Every time you type a character, the state updates
2. This causes `ToolsPage` to re-render
3. A new `ParameterCard` function is created each render
4. React sees this as a different component type (different function reference)
5. React unmounts the old components and mounts new ones
6. This destroys the DOM elements including the focused input

By moving `ParameterCard` **outside** the main component, it becomes a stable function reference that doesn't change between renders, so React properly reconciles the components and maintains focus on the input fields.

```diff
+   id: string;
+   dataType: string;

+   required: boolean;
+   description: string;
+   properties?: Parameter[];
+   items?: Parameter; // For array types - defines the schema of array items
+ };
+ 
+ type ParameterCardProps = {
+   param: Parameter;
+   path: string[];
+   onUpdate: (path: string[], updates: Partial&lt;Parameter&gt;) =&gt; void;
+   onRemove: (parentPath: string[], id: string) =&gt; void;
+   onAddProperty: (path: string[]) =&gt; void;
+   onSetItems: (path: string[], items: Parameter | undefined) =&gt; void;
+   validationAttempted: boolean;
+   isProperty?: boolean;
+   isArrayItem?: boolean;
+ };
+ 
+ // Recursive component for rendering parameter/property cards

+   onUpdate,
```

```diff
@@ -471,4 +471,71 @@
      }
    };
+ 
+   // Helper function to convert Parameter to JSON Schema format for LLM function calling
+   const parameterToJsonSchema = (param: Parameter): Record&lt;string, any&gt; =&gt; {
+     const schema: Record&lt;string, any&gt; = {
+       type: param.dataType,
+       description: param.description,
+     };
+ 
+     // Handle array type - add items schema
+     if (param.dataType === "array" &amp;&amp; param.items) {
+       schema.items = {
+         type: param.items.dataType,
+         description: param.items.description,
+       };
+       // If array items are objects, add their properties
+       if (param.items.dataType === "object" &amp;&amp; param.items.properties &amp;&amp; param.items.properties.length &gt; 0) {
+         schema.items.properties = {};
+         const requiredProps: string[] = [];
+         param.items.properties.forEach((prop) =&gt; {
+           schema.items.properties[prop.name] = parameterToJsonSchema(prop);
+           if (prop.required) {
+             requiredProps.push(prop.name);
+           }
+         });
+         if (requiredProps.length &gt; 0) {
+           schema.items.required = requiredProps;
+         }
+       }
+       // If array items are arrays, recursively add their items
+       if (param.items.dataType === "array" &amp;&amp; param.items.items) {
+         schema.items.items = parameterToJsonSchema({ ...param.items.items, name: "", required: true });
+         delete schema.items.items.required;
+       }
+     }
+ 
+     // Handle object type - add properties schema
+     if (param.dataType === "object" &amp;&amp; param.properties &amp;&amp; param.properties.length &gt; 0) {
+       schema.properties = {};
+       const requiredProps: string[] = [];
+       param.properties.forEach((prop) =&gt; {
+         schema.properties[prop.name] = parameterToJsonSchema(prop);
+         if (prop.required) {
+           requiredProps.push(prop.name);
+         }
+       });
+       if (requiredProps.length &gt; 0) {
+         schema.required = requiredProps;
+       }
+     }
+ 
+     return schema;
+   };
+ 
+   // Helper function to build parameters config for API
+   const buildParametersConfig = (params: Parameter[]): Record&lt;string, any&gt; =&gt; {
+     const config: Record&lt;string, any&gt; = {};
+     params.forEach((param) =&gt; {
+       if (param.name) {
+         const schema = parameterToJsonSchema(param);
+         config[param.name] = {
+           ...schema,
+           required: param.required,
+         };
+       }
+     });
+     return config;
+   };
  
    // Create tool via POST API
```

```diff
@@ -608,4 +608,62 @@
      }
    };
+ 
+   // Helper function to parse JSON Schema items into Parameter (for arrays)
+   const parseItemsSchema = (itemsConfig: any): Parameter =&gt; {
+     const itemParam: Parameter = {
+       id: crypto.randomUUID(),
+       name: "",
+       dataType: itemsConfig.type || "string",
+       required: true,
+       description: itemsConfig.description || "",
+     };
+ 
+     // Parse nested properties for object items
+     if (itemsConfig.type === "object" &amp;&amp; itemsConfig.properties) {
+       itemParam.properties = [];
+       const requiredProps = itemsConfig.required || [];
+       Object.entries(itemsConfig.properties).forEach(
+         ([propName, propConfig]: [string, any]) =&gt; {
+           itemParam.properties!.push(parseParameterSchema(propName, propConfig, requiredProps.includes(propName)));
+         }
+       );
+     }
+ 
+     // Parse nested items for array items
+     if (itemsConfig.type === "array" &amp;&amp; itemsConfig.items) {
+       itemParam.items = parseItemsSchema(itemsConfig.items);
+     }
+ 
+     return itemParam;
+   };
+ 
+   // Helper function to parse JSON Schema parameter into Parameter
+   const parseParameterSchema = (paramName: string, paramConfig: any, isRequired: boolean = true): Parameter =&gt; {
+     const param: Parameter = {
+       id: crypto.randomUUID(),
+       name: paramName,
+       dataType: paramConfig.type || "string",
+       required: paramConfig.required ?? isRequired,
+       description: paramConfig.description || "",
+     };
+ 
+     // Parse items for array type
+     if (paramConfig.type === "array" &amp;&amp; paramConfig.items) {
+       param.items = parseItemsSchema(paramConfig.items);
+     }
+ 
+     // Parse properties for object type
+     if (paramConfig.type === "object" &amp;&amp; paramConfig.properties) {
+       param.properties = [];
+       const requiredProps = paramConfig.required || [];
+       Object.entries(paramConfig.properties).forEach(
+         ([propName, propConfig]: [string, any]) =&gt; {
+           param.properties!.push(parseParameterSchema(propName, propConfig, requiredProps.includes(propName)));
+         }
+       );
+     }
+ 
+     return param;
+   };
  
    // Fetch tool details by UUID and open edit sidebar
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The changes are complete. Let me summarize what I did:

1. Added a `parameterToJsonSchema` function that recursively converts a Parameter to JSON Schema format:
   - For arrays: adds `items` with `type`, `description`, and nested `properties`/`items` if applicable
   - For objects: adds `properties` with each property's schema and a `required` array

2. Added a `buildParametersConfig` helper that uses `parameterToJsonSchema` for each parameter

3. Updated `createTool` and `updateTool` to use `buildParametersConfig` instead of the simple flat mapping

4. Added `parseItemsSchema` and `parseParameterSchema` helper functions to parse JSON Schema format back into Parameter structure when loading a tool

5. Updated `openEditTool` to use the new parsing helpers

The format now follows the JSON Schema standard for LLM function calling, like the example the user provided.</details></think>

---

Done. I've updated the code to properly handle array and object parameter types in the JSON Schema format for LLM function calling. Here's what was added:

**For creating/updating tools:**
- `parameterToJsonSchema()` - Recursively converts a Parameter to JSON Schema format:
  - Arrays get an `items` field with `type`, `description`, and nested `properties`/`items`
  - Objects get a `properties` field with nested schemas and a `required` array of required property names
- `buildParametersConfig()` - Builds the full parameters config using the JSON Schema converter

**For loading existing tools:**
- `parseItemsSchema()` - Parses JSON Schema `items` into a Parameter (for arrays)
- `parseParameterSchema()` - Recursively parses JSON Schema parameter config into Parameter structure

Now when you create a tool with an array parameter, the API will receive something like:

```json
{
  "questions_answered": {
    "type": "array",
    "description": "The indices of questions answered",
    "items": {
      "type": "integer",
      "description": "The index of each question"
    },
    "required": true
  }
}
```

And for objects:

```json
{
  "user_info": {
    "type": "object",
    "description": "User information",
    "properties": {
      "name": {
        "type": "string",
        "description": "User's name"
      },
      "age": {
        "type": "integer", 
        "description": "User's age"
      }
    },
    "required": ["name", "age"],
    "required": true
  }
}
```

```diff
+ export type DataFieldProperty = {
+   id: string;
+   dataType: string;
+   name: string;
+   description: string;
+   properties?: DataFieldProperty[];
+   items?: DataFieldProperty;
+ };
+ 
+ type DataFieldPropertyCardProps = {
+   property: DataFieldProperty;
+   path: string[];
+   onUpdate: (path: string[], updates: Partial&lt;DataFieldProperty&gt;) =&gt; void;
+   onRemove: (parentPath: string[], id: string) =&gt; void;
+   onAddProperty: (path: string[]) =&gt; void;
+   onSetItems: (path: string[], items: DataFieldProperty | undefined) =&gt; void;
+   isArrayItem?: boolean;
+ };
+ 
+ // Recursive component for rendering data field property cards
+ export const DataFieldPropertyCard = ({
+   property,
+   path,
+   onUpdate,
+   onRemove,
+   onAddProperty,
+   onSetItems,
+   isArrayItem = false,
+ }: DataFieldPropertyCardProps) =&gt; {
+   const currentPath = [...path, property.id];
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-5 space-y-5 bg-background"&gt;
+       {/* Data type and Identifier */}
+       &lt;div className={isArrayItem ? "" : "flex gap-4"}&gt;
+         &lt;div className={isArrayItem ? "" : "w-40"}&gt;
+           &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;Data type&lt;/label&gt;
+           &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+             &lt;select
+               value={property.dataType}
+               onChange={(e) =&gt; {
+                 const newType = e.target.value;
+                 onUpdate(isArrayItem ? path : currentPath, {
+                   dataType: newType,
+                 });
+               }}
+               className="w-full h-10 pl-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none"
+             &gt;
+               &lt;option value="boolean"&gt;Boolean&lt;/option&gt;
+               &lt;option value="integer"&gt;Integer&lt;/option&gt;
+               &lt;option value="number"&gt;Number&lt;/option&gt;
+               &lt;option value="string"&gt;String&lt;/option&gt;
+               &lt;option value="object"&gt;Object&lt;/option&gt;
+               &lt;option value="array"&gt;Array&lt;/option&gt;
+             &lt;/select&gt;
+             &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+               &lt;svg
+                 className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
+                 fill="none"
+                 viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                 stroke="currentColor"
+                 strokeWidth={2}
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;path
+                   strokeLinecap="round"
+                   strokeLinejoin="round"
+                   d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/svg&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         {!isArrayItem &amp;&amp; (
+           &lt;div className="flex-1"&gt;
+             &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;
+               Identifier
+             &lt;/label&gt;
+             &lt;input
+               type="text"
+               value={property.name}
+               onChange={(e) =&gt;
+                 onUpdate(currentPath, { name: e.target.value })
+               }
+               className="w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent"
+             /&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         )}
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Description */}
+       &lt;div&gt;
+         &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;Description&lt;/label&gt;
+         &lt;textarea
+           value={property.description}
+           onChange={(e) =&gt;
+             onUpdate(isArrayItem ? path : currentPath, {
+               description: e.target.value,
+             })
+           }
+           rows={3}
+           className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent resize-none"
+         /&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Properties section for object type */}
+       {property.dataType === "object" &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div&gt;
+           &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;Properties&lt;/label&gt;
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl bg-[#1b1b1b] p-4 space-y-4"&gt;
+             {property.properties &amp;&amp;
+               property.properties.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp;
+               property.properties.map((prop) =&gt; (
+                 &lt;DataFieldPropertyCard
+                   key={prop.id}
+                   property={prop}
+                   path={isArrayItem ? path : currentPath}
+                   onUpdate={onUpdate}
+                   onRemove={onRemove}
+                   onAddProperty={onAddProperty}
+                   onSetItems={onSetItems}
+                 /&gt;
+               ))}
+             &lt;div className="flex justify-center"&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 type="button"
+                 onClick={() =&gt;
+                   onAddProperty(isArrayItem ? path : currentPath)
+                 }
+                 className="h-10 px-6 rounded-md text-sm font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+               &gt;
+                 Add property
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+ 
+       {/* Item section for array type */}
+       {property.dataType === "array" &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div&gt;
+           &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;Item&lt;/label&gt;
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl bg-[#1b1b1b] p-4 space-y-4"&gt;
+             &lt;DataFieldPropertyCard
+               property={
+                 property.items || {
+                   id: crypto.randomUUID(),
+                   dataType: "string",
+                   name: "",
+                   description: "",
+                 }
+               }
+               path={
+                 isArrayItem
+                   ? [...path, "__items__"]
+                   : [...currentPath, "__items__"]
+               }
+               onUpdate={onUpdate}
+               onRemove={onRemove}
+               onAddProperty={onAddProperty}
+               onSetItems={onSetItems}
+               isArrayItem={true}
+             /&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+ 
+       {/* Delete button - not shown for array items */}
+       {!isArrayItem &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="flex justify-end"&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={() =&gt; onRemove(path, property.id)}
+             className="h-9 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium text-red-500 bg-red-500/10 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-500/20 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+           &gt;
+             Delete
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ };
+
```

```diff
      setCreateDataFieldError(null);

+ 
+   // Helper function to convert DataFieldProperty to JSON Schema format
+   const dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema = (
+     prop: DataFieldProperty
+   ): Record&lt;string, any&gt; =&gt; {
+     const schema: Record&lt;string, any&gt; = {
+       type: prop.dataType,
+       description: prop.description,
+     };
+ 
+     // Handle array type - add items schema
+     if (prop.dataType === "array" &amp;&amp; prop.items) {
+       schema.items = {
+         type: prop.items.dataType,
+         description: prop.items.description,
+       };
+       // If array items are objects, add their properties
+       if (
+         prop.items.dataType === "object" &amp;&amp;
+         prop.items.properties &amp;&amp;
+         prop.items.properties.length &gt; 0
+       ) {
+         schema.items.properties = {};
+         prop.items.properties.forEach((p) =&gt; {
+           schema.items.properties[p.name] = dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema(p);
+         });
+       }
+       // If array items are arrays, recursively add their items
+       if (prop.items.dataType === "array" &amp;&amp; prop.items.items) {
+         schema.items.items = dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema(prop.items.items);
+       }
+     }
+ 
+     // Handle object type - add properties schema
+     if (
+       prop.dataType === "object" &amp;&amp;
+       prop.properties &amp;&amp;
+       prop.properties.length &gt; 0
+     ) {
+       schema.properties = {};
+       prop.properties.forEach((p) =&gt; {
+         schema.properties[p.name] = dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema(p);
+       });
+     }
+ 
+     return schema;
+   };
+ 
+   // Build the full data field config for API
+   const buildDataFieldConfig = (): Record&lt;string, any&gt; =&gt; {
+     const config: Record&lt;string, any&gt; = {
+       type: dataFieldDataType,
+       description: dataFieldDescription.trim(),
+     };
+ 
+     // Add properties for object type
+     if (
+       dataFieldDataType === "object" &amp;&amp;
+       dataFieldProperties.length &gt; 0
+     ) {
+       config.properties = {};
+       dataFieldProperties.forEach((prop) =&gt; {
+         config.properties[prop.name] = dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema(prop);
+       });
+     }
+ 
+     // Add items for array type
+     if (dataFieldDataType === "array" &amp;&amp; dataFieldItems) {
+       config.items = {
+         type: dataFieldItems.dataType,
+         description: dataFieldItems.description,
+       };
+       // If array items are objects, add their properties
+       if (
+         dataFieldItems.dataType === "object" &amp;&amp;
+         dataFieldItems.properties &amp;&amp;
+         dataFieldItems.properties.length &gt; 0
+       ) {
+         config.items.properties = {};
+         dataFieldItems.properties.forEach((prop) =&gt; {
+           config.items.properties[prop.name] =
+             dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema(prop);
+         });
+       }
+       // If array items are arrays, recursively add their items
+       if (dataFieldItems.dataType === "array" &amp;&amp; dataFieldItems.items) {
+         config.items.items = dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema(dataFieldItems.items);
+       }
+     }
+ 
+     return config;
+   };
  
    // Helper functions for data field properties (recursive)
```

Done! I've applied all the learnings from the tools page to the data extraction dialog. Here's what was changed:

**1. Created new component file `src/components/DataFieldPropertyCard.tsx`**
- Moved `DataFieldProperty` type and `DataFieldPropertyCard` component outside the main component to prevent focus loss on re-renders

**2. Updated `AgentDetail.tsx` with:**

- **Import the new component and type**

- **Auto-scroll functionality:**
  - Added `dataFieldSidebarContentRef` ref for the sidebar content
  - Added `scrollDataFieldSidebarToBottom()` function
  - Updated `addDataFieldProperty()`, `handleAddPropertyAtPath()`, and `addPropertyToItems()` to scroll after adding
  - Added ref to the sidebar content div

- **JSON Schema format for API:**
  - Added `dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema()` helper to recursively convert properties to JSON Schema
  - Added `buildDataFieldConfig()` to build the full config with proper `items` (for arrays) and `properties` (for objects)
  - Updated the API call to include the JSON Schema formatted config

Now when you create a data extraction field with array or object types, the API will receive proper JSON Schema like:

```json
{
  "name": "user_responses",
  "type": "array",
  "description": "List of user responses",
  "items": {
    "type": "object",
    "description": "A single response",
    "properties": {
      "question_id": {
        "type": "integer",
        "description": "The question ID"
      },
      "answer": {
        "type": "string", 
        "description": "The user's answer"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The changes are complete. Let me summarize what I did:

1. Added `dataFieldValidationAttempted` state to track if validation has been attempted
2. Updated `resetDataFieldForm` to also reset the validation state
3. Added validation helper functions:
   - `hasInvalidDataFieldProperties` - recursively validates properties (name and description required)
   - `hasInvalidSingleDataFieldProperty` - validates a single property (description required for array items)
   - `isDataFieldFormValid` - checks if the entire form is valid
4. Updated `DataFieldPropertyCard` component to accept `validationAttempted` prop and show red borders on validation failure
5. Updated the main form inputs (Name and Description) to show red borders when validation fails
6. Passed `validationAttempted` prop to all `DataFieldPropertyCard` components
7. Updated the create button handler to set `dataFieldValidationAttempted(true)` and use `isDataFieldFormValid()` check

Now when the user clicks "Add field" button with empty fields, red borders will show around the empty Name and Description fields, and recursively for any empty fields in nested object/array properties.</details></think>

---

Done! I've added validation for the data extraction field form. Here's what was implemented:

**1. Added validation state:**
- `dataFieldValidationAttempted` - tracks if the user has tried to submit

**2. Added validation helper functions:**
- `hasInvalidDataFieldProperties()` - recursively validates properties (name and description required)
- `hasInvalidSingleDataFieldProperty()` - validates array items (description required)
- `isDataFieldFormValid()` - checks if the entire form is valid including nested properties

**3. Updated UI to show red borders:**
- Main Name field shows red border when empty after clicking create
- Main Description field shows red border when empty after clicking create
- `DataFieldPropertyCard` now accepts `validationAttempted` prop
- Nested properties recursively show red borders for empty Identifier and Description fields

**4. Updated create button:**
- Sets `dataFieldValidationAttempted(true)` when clicked
- Uses `isDataFieldFormValid()` to check all fields before submitting
- Removed the `!dataFieldIdentifier.trim()` check from disabled since validation now handles it

Now when you click "Add field" with empty required fields:
- Empty Name/Description fields will get a red border
- For object types: empty property Identifier/Description fields will get red borders
- For array types: empty item Description fields will get red borders
- All nested properties in objects/arrays are validated recursively
